channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Incorrect CC sign, 10th March
item.description:
At this location on the A200 westbound, there is a sign showing the Congestion Charge times for central London. The times shown are incorrect, see attached picture from this location. Sign needs correcting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelyn Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and damaged surface, 10th March
item.description:
Pothole and very damaged road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Underpass, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped bed, 10th March
item.description:
Outside number 2 duppree road charlton se71rr
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 10th March
item.description:
There is a "trench" across the inside lane of the northbound A10 Cambridge road on the corner of College road. it is unavoidable in this line and quite deep. what 3 words ///risk.swear.bring
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic camera vandalised, 10th March
item.description:
On the corner of Nevill Road and Allen Road N16, the camera enforcing the traffic filter has been vandalised and is now pointing skywards. Please can you have it re-aligned to stop drivers ignoring the filter? thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 10th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Dog foul, 10th March
item.description:
On pavement not picked up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nightingale Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fires started on fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
I reported to you a couple of years ago about fires having been started on the footpath which leads from Martens Hill down to Beckenham Lane. It appears they have started up again - I saw a number of sites with the remains of fires, including one which included an aerosol can. Another fire site was beside a litter bin on the steep footpath which runs parallel to Glassmill Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular pavement parking, 10th March
item.description:
Regular pavement parking and unloading taking place daily in this area. Vehicles are mounting the pavement and stopping for long periods while unloading, causing obstruction to pedestrians and traffic This creates a safety risk and restricts safe access along the pavement. Please investigate and arrange regular enforcement to prevent ongoing obstruction and ensure compliance with parking regulations.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on wall next to Mind Charity shop facing tintagel crescent saying "Muslims stop killing", 10th March
item.description:
Offensive racist language at the enterance to a road leading to a school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By railway Claremont road, 10th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped garden chairs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: At junction of Mill Lane and Fordwych Road, 10th March
item.description:
I watched the "completion" of the repair, a workman "tamped down" WITH HIS FEET the loose tarmac he had just poured approximately into the pothole. He and his mate then got back into their vehicle to chat. I was unable to snap him using his feet, as I was driving. By the time I returned to photograph the "repair", fragments of tarmac were already spreading around as a result of cars passing over. I don't think Camden is getting value for money!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Fordwych Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Tyler St, 10th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in this location was cleared yesterday evening and this bin bag has been dumped here today after 08:30 (I left the house at 08:30 and the area was empty). The bag has been dumped again by the metal gates just next to 2 Tyler Street. The street remains filthy with strewn rubbish from the previous fly tip. We need this cleared and a solution to prevent further fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos tiles dumped on the pavement., 10th March
item.description:
Asbestos tiles dumped on the pavement in a couple of locations along Cranmer road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vassall Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned/Fly tipped Mattress, 10th March
item.description:
Mattress left for weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montana Gardens, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Kerb Stone collapsed, 10th March
item.description:
The Kirby stone has collapsed, been like it for sometime. Possible trip hazard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albury Avenue, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Dust and Dirt, 10th March
item.description:
Elmers End Road between Stanhope Grove to Eden Park Avenue. Litter, dust and dirt along kerbside. Please can this be cleared, is where the vehicles are parked.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Elmers End Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car sat here for nearly 2 years, 10th March
item.description:
The car has not moved for nearly 2 years. The roadworks had to be completed round it. It somehow passes it’s MOT even though it hasn’t moved. The road can’t be cleaned round it. Looks a mess, tyres are flat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seward Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 10th March
item.description:
The Alley is overgrown and has become a dumping ground. Not very pleasant. Dumped waste on footpath by flats as well. Always an issue up this street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seward Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing not usable, 10th March
item.description:
Pedestrian crossing not usable, it's full of debris.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vassall Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
